c.d: The design and layout of the app, affecting ease of use and user experience.
Tools and functionalities that facilitate messaging, video calls, and real-time collaboration.
The ability of the app to connect and work seamlessly with other software and services.
Features that allow users to create, assign, and track tasks and projects.
Functionalities that enable users to share and store files securely within the app.
Protocols and features implemented to protect user data and ensure privacy.
The cost structure of the app, including free tiers and premium plans.
The range of devices and operating systems on which the app is accessible.
